ModMetaData.name: RimLogging
ModMetaData.author: CryptikLemur
ModMetaData.description:
A public logging framework for RimWorld mods.
Replaces vanilla and Unity logging with a structured, channel-based, multi-sink pipeline. Features hierarchical channels (XML-defined or transient), Serilog-style templated messages with structured context, an expression-based filter DSL, and a three-pane in-game log viewer (when Lightweave is installed).
Other mods can depend on this and call Cryptiklemur.RimLogging.Log.Info / Warn / Error / Fatal directly. Vanilla Verse.Log and UnityEngine.Debug.Log calls are also captured and routed through the framework.
Distributed as both a Steam Workshop dependency mod and a NuGet package. MIT licensed.
